text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come for Sakura Bakushin O
to run in her debut race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: At long last! My debut race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: My greatest challenge yet! The time is now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
First, I'll make a huge splash with the perfect
debut, and then everyone will be like...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm ready to give them the surprise of their lives!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's time for my glorious debut!
